protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “Static extraction method… Collect the hydrophobic liquid using a pipette… add… to the qPCR buffer” and “DNA-enriched MIL or IL was… integrated into the qPCR buffer without inhibiting the reaction.”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “Dispersive extraction method… Disperse the sample using a vortex… Recover the MIL with a magnet… Pipette… into the qPCR buffer.”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “One-pot PCR method… Add… plant tissue, … MIL or IL, and the qPCR buffer to a reaction tube.”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “desorption conditions were optimized… The effect of adding a non-ionic surfactant was investigated… addition of… Tween20 to the desorption solution improved DNA recovery…”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “One-pot plant cell lysis and qPCR assay… introducing… Tween20 to the reaction buffer… recovered amplification… [and] reliable amplification…”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “In the static method, the hydrophobic solvent is pipetted directly onto plant tissue and allowed to incubate… The recovery… enables… compatible… such as sequencing”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: Fig. 10 shows: “Leaf suspension → Add MIL → Vortex → Recover MIL → Desorb in qPCR buffer… qPCR”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
Detergent_products_unresolved_for_lysis: Phire Plant PCR buffer (Phire assay buffer)
protocols.Evidence: “The Phire assay is a commercial one-pot PCR assay… The Phire assay is not qPCR compatible…”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “A. thaliana leaves were… submerged by the hydrophobic solvent… still lysing the plant tissue… allowing the nucleic acids to be amplified by PCR… 0.05% Tween20”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “static one-step cell lysis and DNA extraction… incubated at 25 °C… DNA-enriched MIL… added to the qPCR assay”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “After recovering the MIL with a rod magnet… the DNA-enriched MIL was washed once with water… integrating… into the qPCR assay… or by heating… at 90 °C”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “CTAB lysis… CTAB lysis buffer (2% (w/v) CTAB…)… heating… The sample was centrifuged…”

protocols.Paper_title: Simple and efficient isolation of plant genomic DNA using magnetic ionic liquids
protocols.Evidence: “SDS lysis was performed… 15 min at 100 °C. Afterwards, the sample was centrifuged…”
